statement: In every magma, Equation 815 (`x = y * (z * ((w * u) * u))`) implies Equation 2164 (`x = ((y * z) * x) * (x * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0004
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w u) u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) x) (op x w))
